title: astragalus marianus
intro: Astragalus marianus, also known as Mongolian milkvetch, is a type of perennial plant belonging to the legume family, native to the mountainous regions of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus marianus include boosting the immune system, reducing stress and fatigue, and improving cardiovascular health. It can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as capsules, tablets, and teas, as well as being used in traditional Chinese medicine formulations like decoctions and infusions.
